chunks.body:
pub fn collect_inputs(dir: &Path) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
    WalkDir::new(dir)
        .into_iter()
        .filter_map(|e| e.ok())
        .map(|e| e.into_path())
        .filter(|p| is_pdf(p) || is_image(p))
        .collect()
}

pub fn collect_inputs(dir: &Path) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
    WalkDir::new(dir)
        .into_iter()
        .filter_map(|e| e.ok())
        .map(|e| e.into_path())
        .filter(|p| is_pdf(p) || is_image(p))
        .collect()
}
